payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Dark navy rectangular low-pile floor rug occupying most of the crop; appears medium-to-large in size with a smooth, even surface laid flat on a light-colored floor, with left and bottom edges cropped by the image; approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.
